exercise.title: Exercise
exercise.description: Represents an educational exercise assigned to student levels 5 or 6

text.description: The text content of the exercise

authorId.description: The ID of the teacher author

score.title: Student Score
score.description: Continuous assessment mark or test mark for a student

studentName.description: Full formal name of the student

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this mark was recorded

absence.title: Student Absence
absence.description: Strict absence record of a primary student

document.title: Educational Document
document.description: Worksheets, diagrams, and educational summaries shared by teachers

fileType.description: Category or type of the educational document

fileUrl.description: Firebase Storage or internal download link

authorId.description: The ID of the teacher author

/exercises/{exerciseId}.description: Exercises assigned by the teacher to level 5 or 6

/scores/{scoreId}.description: Student marks including tests and continuous assessments

/absences/{absenceId}.description: Daily absence registry for elementary students of both levels

/documents/{documentId}.description: Worksheets, PDF manuals, and educational summaries shared with students
